headline: Chubb's Dividend Hikes Backed by Earnings Power & Solid Cash Flow?
summary: Chubb plans a 5.2% dividend hike, extending its 33-year growth streak, backed by strong earnings, $13.9B cash flow and a conservative payout ratio.

headline: Planning a trip to Mexico? 5 top travel insurance policies to consider
summary: Getting travel insurance for your trip to Mexico can protect the money you've spent on your plans.
